\tzpentry{ID5898}{Pressure Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5898 introduces Pressure Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$P(s_{\text{dec}}) \propto s_{\text{dec}}^{-3/2}$$
